message:
feat(cx): add standard caveats, third-party support, HMAC-SHA256 (bd-2lqyk.3)

Add ResourceScope (glob-style path matching) and RateLimit (windowed
count) caveat predicates with serialization, verification, and Cx
convenience methods (attenuate_time_limit, attenuate_scope,
attenuate_rate_limit, attenuate_from_budget).

Also integrates third-party caveat support (FirstParty/ThirdParty enum,
verify_with_discharges, bind_for_request) and upgrades HMAC chain from
Phase 0 XOR-mixing to real HMAC-SHA256 (schema v2).

51 macaroon tests + 47 cx tests all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
